title.ko: 유제품, 예. 우유, 버터 또는 치즈; 우유 또는 치즈 대체품; 이의 제조 (이의 보존 A23B11/00)
title.en: DAIRY PRODUCTS, e.g. MILK, BUTTER OR CHEESE; MILK OR CHEESE SUBSTITUTES; PREPARATION THEREOF  (preservation thereof A23B0011000000)

title.ko: 농축, 증발 또는 건조 (이를 통해 얻은 제품 A23C9/00)
title.en: General dairy technology

title.ko: 농축, 증발 또는 건조 (이를 통해 얻은 제품 A23C9/00)
title.en: Concentration, evaporation or drying (products obtained thereby A23C0009000000)
Drying in thin layers
on drums or rollers
by spraying into a gas stream
combined with agglomeration
Concentration by freezing out the water
Freeze drying

title.ko: 포말건조(A23C 1/04, A23C 1/08이 우선)
title.en: Foam drying (A23C0001040000, A23C0001080000 take precedence)
Concentration by evaporation
combined with other treatment
using additives

title.ko: 기타 유제품 기술 (우유 또는 유제품의 보존 A23B11/00)
title.en: Other dairy technology (preservation of milk or dairy products A23B0011000000)
Chemical cleaning of dairy apparatus; Use of sterilisation methods therefor
Removing unwanted substances from milk

title.ko: 유가공품, 분유 또는 분유 제품 (유청과 유가공품 또는 유성분의 혼합물 A23C21/06; 우유 또는 유가공품의 보존 A23B11/10)
title.en: Dairy products; Processes specially adapted therefor

title.ko: 유가공품, 분유 또는 분유 제품 (유청과 유가공품 또는 유성분의 혼합물 A23C21/06; 우유 또는 유가공품의 보존 A23B11/10)
title.en: Milk preparations; Milk powder or milk powder preparations  (mixtures of whey with milk products or milk components A23C0021060000; preservation of milk or milk preparations A23B0011100000)

title.ko: 발효유 제품; 미생물 또는 효소를 이용한 처리
title.en: Fermented milk preparations; Treatment using microorganisms or enzymes

title.ko: 유산균(Lactobacteriaceae속)만을 사용하는 것; 요구르트(A23C 9/13이 우선)
title.en: using only microorganisms of the genus lactobacteriaceae; Yoghurt (A23C0009130000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 유산균(Lactobacteriaceae속)과 다른 미생물 또는 효소를 사용하는 것, 예, 케피르(kefir), 쿠미스(koumiss) (A23C9/13이 우선)
title.en: using microorganisms of the genus lactobacteriaceae and other microorganisms or enzymes, e.g. kefir, koumiss (A23C0009130000 takes precedence)
using additives
Fruit or vegetables
Thickening substances

title.ko: 우유류의 화학적 조성이 비화학적 처리에 의하여 변성된 것
title.en: in which the chemical composition of the milk is modified by non-chemical treatment

title.ko: 투석, 역삼투 또는 한외여과에 의한 것(A23C 9/144가 우선)
title.en: by dialysis, reverse osmosis or ultrafiltration (A23C0009144000 takes precedence)
by electrical means, e.g. electrodialysis
by ion-exchange
by molecular sieve or gel filtration
Reconstituted or recombined milk products containing neither non-milk fat nor non-milk proteins

title.ko: 첨가물을 함유한 것 (첨가물을 함유한 발효유 제품 A23C9/13)
title.en: containing additives (fermented milk preparations containing additives A23C0009130000)
containing thickening substances, eggs or cereal preparations; Milk gels
Flavoured milk preparations
containing vitamins or antibiotics

title.ko: 응고 또는 과립형 분유; 인스턴트 분유의 제조; 이에 따라 얻어진 제품 (A23C9/18이 우선)
title.en: Agglomerating or granulating milk powder; Making instant milk powder; Products obtained thereby (A23C0009180000 takes precedence)
Milk in dried and compressed or semi-solid form

title.ko: A23C 9/12~A23C 9/18까지의 분류에 포함되지 않는 다이어트 유제품
title.en: Dietetic milk products not covered by groups A23C0009120000-A23C0009180000

title.ko: 우유 대체품, 예. 커피 화이트너 조성물 (치즈 대체품 A23C20/00; 우유 대체품의 보존 A23B11/20; 버터 대체품 A23D)
title.en: Milk substitutes, e.g. coffee whitener compositions  (cheese substitutes A23C0020000000; preservation of milk substitutes A23B0011200000; butter substitutes A23D)

title.ko: 지방 또는 단백질의 공급원으로써 비-우유 성분을 하나 이상 함유한 것 (치즈 커드 제조시 비-유지방 또는 비-유단백질의 첨가 A23C19/055; 지방 또는 단백질의 공급원으로써 비-우유 성분을 함유하는 유청 또는 유청 제품 A23C21/04)
title.en: containing at least one non-milk component as source of fats or proteins (addition of non-milk fats or non-milk proteins in making cheese curd A23C0019055000;whey or whey preparations containing non-milk components as source of fats or proteins A23C0021040000)

title.ko: 비-유지방을 함유하나 비-유단백질은 함유하지 않은 것 (A23C11/08, A23C11/10이 우선)
title.en: containing non-milk fats but no non-milk proteins (A23C0011080000, A23C0011100000 take precedence)

title.ko: 비-유단백질을 함유한 것 (A23C11/08, A23C11/10이 우선)
title.en: containing non-milk proteins (A23C0011080000, A23C0011100000 take precedence)
containing caseinates but no other milk proteins nor milk fats
containing or not lactose but no other milk components as source of fats, carbohydrates or proteins

title.ko: 크림; 크림 제품 (크림 또는 크림 제품의 보존 A23B11/30; 아이스크림A23G9/00) ; 이의 제조
title.en: Cream; Cream preparations (preservation of cream or cream preparations A23B0011300000;ice-cream A23G0009000000); Making thereof
Cream preparations
containing milk products or milk components
containing, or treated with, microorganisms, enzymes, or antibiotics; Sour cream

title.ko: 버터; 버터 제품; 이의 제조 (버터 또는 버터 제품의 보존 A23B11/40; 버터 대체품 A23D)
title.en: Butter; Butter preparations; Making thereof (preservation of butter or butter preparations A23B0011400000;butter substitutes A23D)
Making thereof
from butter oil or anhydrous butter
Treating cream prior to phase inversion
Butter preparations
Butter powder; Butter oil, i.e. melted butter, e.g. ghee
Butter having reduced fat content

title.ko: 버터밀크; 버터밀크 제품 (비-화학적 처리에 의해 우유의 화학적 조성이 변형된 유가공품, 분유 또는 분유 제품 A23C9/14; 버터밀크 또는 버터밀크 제품의 보존 A23B11/50)
title.en: Buttermilk; Buttermilk preparations (milk preparations, milk powder or milk powder preparations in which the chemical composition of the milk is modified by non-chemical treatment A23C0009140000; preservation of buttermilk or buttermilk preparations A23B0011500000)
containing, or treated with, microorganisms or enzymes

title.ko: 치즈; 치즈 제품; 이의 제조 (치즈 대체품 A23C20/00; 치즈 또는 치즈 제품의 보존 A23B11/60)
title.en: Cheese; Cheese preparations; Making thereof  (cheese substitutes A23C0020000000; preservation of cheese or cheese preparations A23B0011600000)

title.ko: 치즈 커드의 제조
title.en: Making cheese curd
using continuous procedure
without substantial whey separation from coagulated milk
characterised by the use of specific microorganisms, or enzymes of microbial origin

title.ko: 식물 또는 동물기원의 특정효소의 사용에 특징이 있는 것(A23C 19/032 우선)
title.en: characterised by the use of specific enzymes of vegetable or animal origin (A23C0019032000 takes precedence)
Coagulation of milk without rennet or rennet substitutes
Treating milk before coagulation; Separating whey from curd
Addition of non-milk fats or non-milk proteins

title.ko: 유청 분리 후 치즈 커드의 처리; 그로부터 얻어진 제품
title.en: Treating cheese curd after whey separation; Products obtained thereby
Salting

title.ko: 특정 형태의 치즈
title.en: Particular types of cheese
Cheddar type
Soft unripened cheese, e.g. cottage or cream cheese

title.ko: 치즈제조 공정; 그 제조, 예. 용융, 유화, 살균
title.en: Process cheese preparations; Making thereof, e.g. melting, emulsifying, sterilizing
Adding substances to the curd before or during melting; Melting salts

title.ko: 용융 후의 커드의 처리 또는 그것에 물질을 첨가하는 것 (비유성분을 첨가하는 것 A23C19/093)
title.en: Treating the curd, or adding substances thereto, after melting (adding non-milk components A23C0019093000)
Cheese powder; Dried cheese preparations
Other cheese preparations; Mixtures of cheese with other foodstuffs
Addition of non-milk fats or non-milk proteins
Treating cheese after having reached its definite form, e.g. ripening or smoking
Covering the cheese surface, e.g. with wax coating compositions

title.ko: 치즈 대체품 (A23C19/055, A23C19/093이 우선; 치즈 대체품의 보존 A23B11/70)
title.en: Cheese substitutes  (A23C0019055000, A23C0019093000 take precedence; preservation of cheese substitutes A23B0011700000)
containing neither milk components, nor caseinate, nor lactose, as sources of fats, proteins or carbohydrates

title.ko: 유청; 유청 제품 (농축, 증발 또는 건조 A23C1/00; 비-화학적 처리에 의해 우유의 화학적 조성이 변형된 유가공품, 분유 또는 분유 제품 A23C9/14; 유청 또는 유청 제품의 보존 A23B11/80)
title.en: Whey; Whey preparations  (concentration, evaporation or drying A23C0001000000; milk preparations, milk powder or milk powder preparations in which the chemical composition of the milk is modified by non-chemical treatment A23C0009140000; preservation of whey or whey preparations A23B0011800000)
containing, or treated with, microorganisms or enzymes
containing non-milk components as source of fats or proteins
Mixtures of whey with milk products or milk components
containing other organic additives, e.g. vegetable or animal products
containing inorganic additives
Other dairy products
